Heritage Palms.clarification_message:
Which Heritage Palms community do you mean? Please use one of these specific aliases:
- HPD = Heritage Palms Dunbar
- HPM = Heritage Palms Miles
- HPN = Heritage Palms North
- HPS = Heritage Palms South
- HPW = Heritage Palms Wal

Palm Isles.clarification_message:
Which Palm Isles community do you mean? Please use one of these specific aliases:
- PLMIM = Palm Isles Main
- PLMIC = Palm Isles Condo 3
